product_overview: Salão de Bolso is a multi-tenant SaaS PWA to help salon owners and independent professionals manage appointments, clients and finances while allowing public online bookings without login.
core_goals: Provide secure multi-tenant management of schedules, clients and finances using Supabase with Row Level Security (RLS).
Expose a public booking experience that allows customers to reserve services without authentication and converts public bookings into internal appointments.
Offer tenant-isolated CRUD for clients and financial transactions with role-protected administrative operations.
Support notifications, reminders and auditing to improve retention and ensure traceability of critical actions.

features.name: User Management
features.description: Sign up / sign in and tenant-scoped profile management for salon owners and staff.
user_flows: RPC auth.users (Supabase Internal) with signup payload (email,password) -> Receive 201 with user id and session token -> GET public.usuarios with session token -> Receive current profile (empty/default) -> UPDATE public.usuarios with profile fields and token -> Receive 200 with updated profile
RPC auth.users (Supabase Internal) sign-in with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> GET public.usuarios without token -> Receive 401/403

features.name: Appointment System (Internal + Online)
features.description: Create, view and manage appointments; support public online booking and conversion to internal appointments.
user_flows: RPC public.buscar_horarios_com_multiplos_intervalos with {service_id,date} (anonymous) -> Receive 200 with available time slots -> INSERT public.agendamentos_online with chosen slot and customer data (anonymous) -> Receive 201 booking confirmation -> RPC public.converter_agendamento_online with booking_id and admin token -> Receive 200 and appointment created in internal schedule

RPC public.buscar_horarios_com_multiplos_intervalos with {service_id,date} (anonymous) -> Receive 200 but chosen slot is not listed -> INSERT public.agendamentos_online with chosen slot -> Receive 409 Conflict or 400 with slot-unavailable error -> RPC public.converter_agendamento_online called without token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Public Online Booking (PWA / Anonymous)
features.description: Public-facing booking flow that lists available services and allows anonymous customers to create bookings that admins review/convert.
user_flows: RPC public.buscar_horarios_com_multiplos_intervalos with {service_id,date} (anonymous) -> Receive 200 with slots -> INSERT public.agendamentos_online with customer contact and selected slot (anonymous) -> Receive 201 and public booking id

INSERT public.agendamentos_online with missing required customer fields (anonymous) -> Receive 400 Bad Request -> RPC public.buscar_horarios_com_multiplos_intervalos with invalid date format -> Receive 400 Validation Error

features.name: Financial Core
features.description: Record and report income, expenses and fixed costs; generate tenant-scoped financial summaries.
user_flows: INSERT public.lancamentos_financeiros with {type:'income',amount,date,tenant_id} and admin token -> Receive 201 with transaction id -> SELECT public.resumo_financeiro with token -> Receive 200 with updated financial summary for tenant
INSERT public.lancamentos_financeiros with missing amount or invalid type and token -> Receive 400 Validation Error -> GET public.resumo_financeiro without token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Client Management (CRM)
features.description: Tenant-isolated client CRUD, history tracking and loyalty program support.
user_flows: INSERT public.clientes with {name,contact,tenant_id} and admin token -> Receive 201 with client_id -> SELECT public.clientes with token -> Receive 200 with list including new client -> UPDATE public.clientes with notes and token -> Receive 200 with updated client record
DELETE public.clientes with non-existent client_id and token -> Receive 404 Not Found -> SELECT public.clientes with expired/invalid token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Marketing & Retention (Reminders / Notifications)
features.description: Store reminder preferences and trigger scheduled reminders / push notifications to improve retention.
user_flows: UPDATE public.usuarios with reminder preferences (reminder_window,channels) and token -> Receive 200 acknowledging preferences -> POST /edge/functions/trigger_reminders with {tenant_id,date_range} and service token -> Receive 200 with scheduled reminders dispatched

UPDATE public.usuarios with invalid reminder schedule and token -> Receive 400 Validation Error -> POST /edge/functions/trigger_reminders for tenant without subscription -> Receive 402 Payment Required or 403 Forbidden

features.name: Audit & Security (Multi-tenancy via RLS)
features.description: Ensure tenant data isolation using RLS and audit logs for critical actions (appointments, finances, client edits).
user_flows: RPC auth.users sign-in with tenant admin credentials -> Receive 200 with session token -> SELECT public.clientes with token -> Receive 200 with only clients filtered by user_id (RLS enforced)
SELECT public.clientes?user_id=other_tenant with valid token -> Receive 403 Forbidden due to RLS -> Attempt SELECT public.clientes without token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: User Management
features.description: Core user profile management and multi-tenancy

features.name: Appointment System
features.description: Management of regular and online appointments

endpoints.description: Get available time slots for a service and date
Convert public online booking to regular appointment

features.description: Tracking income, expenses, and fixed costs
